title: 杠杆之王谢幕：BitMEX 死了，永续合约永生 | 原文
content: BitMEX, the cryptocurrency exchange that invented the perpetual futures contract, announced it will cease trading operations on September 23, 2026. Once dominant in leveraged crypto trading, the exchange has been eclipsed by competitors like Binance, OKX, Bybit, and newer on-chain platforms such as Hyperliquid. Though no longer a mainstream exchange, BitMEX's legacy endures through the perpetual contract, now a foundational product across virtually all crypto trading platforms.

title: 如何解决 claude code 使用 deepseek 不明中缓存导致费用暴涨的问题
content: Claude Code's Attribution Block feature inserts dynamic metadata at the start of each API request's system prompt, preventing DeepSeek from properly caching prompts and causing unexpectedly high costs. The metadata includes client version, session ID, fingerprint, and platform information that changes per request. Users can disable this behavior by setting the environment variable `CLAUDE_CODE_ATTRIBUTION_HEADER=0` in their Claude Code configuration, which restores cache hit rates and reduces API expenses.

title: 卢德运动简史
content: The Luddite movement originated in early 19th-century England as protests by textile workers against industrial machinery that threatened their livelihoods. Named after Ned Ludd, a legendary figure, workers destroyed labor-saving equipment. Though often mischaracterized as anti-technology, the movement targeted specific employers using machines to cut wages and jobs rather than rejecting progress itself. British authorities violently suppressed the protests, executing and transporting participants. The term "Luddite" persists today, sometimes inaccurately, to describe opponents of technological change.

title: 我发现了自研编程语言的一条出路
content: The author ported 230,000 lines of compiler code to their self-developed programming language, reducing it to 190,000 lines. Key features like pattern matching, auto-imports, and compile-time decorators drove this efficiency gain. They used an automated translation tool for porting and believe future language value lies in AI-oriented priorities: code clarity, easier testing, stronger static analysis, self-healing capabilities, and richer LSP APIs for AI generation correctness and token efficiency rather than brevity.

title: Why malloc always does more than I asked for?
content: Memory allocators like malloc request extra space beyond the requested size for bookkeeping metadata, alignment padding, and fragmentation management. This overhead enables tracking allocation sizes, ensuring proper memory alignment for performance, and maintaining data structures for free memory blocks. The actual allocated block is typically larger than requested, though the excess is invisible to the caller.

title: 陪伴大家十几年的充电宝，大概要走到头了
content: Traditional small power banks are declining as smartphone batteries now exceed 6,000mAh and fast charging makes them less necessary. Shared power bank companies are failing financially. Stricter national standards and 3C certification have eliminated half of China's 1,000+ manufacturers by raising costs 20-30%. However, the broader portable power market grew to 43 billion yuan, driven by outdoor power stations for camping and travel. Leading firms like Anker and Ugreen have pivoted to premium chargers, outdoor power supplies, and expanded digital accessories. The industry is shifting from phone backup power to full-scenario energy solutions.

title: 二十一年，用本金换来的十条心得
content: An investor with 21 years of market experience shares ten hard-won principles: treat stocks as businesses with strong ROE and cash flow; buy cheap using valuation formulas; ignore market noise and buy during panic; embrace patience with long-term holdings; avoid unfamiliar sectors; buy quality companies during crises; use PEG to avoid overpaying for growth; minimize trading costs; maintain cash reserves using a half-Kelly approach; and diversify across 10 stocks max with 15% single-stock limits. Core wisdom: buy good companies cheaply, always calculate downside first, and survive through humility and systematic discipline.

title: 梁文锋录音摘录（26.5.20）完整
content: Liang Wenfeng discusses DeepSeek's philosophy of restraint in AI development, emphasizing open-source, reasonable profits, and team stability as core interests. He outlines a roadmap toward AGI through chain-of-thought, agents, and continuous learning. China lags the US by 6-18 months but operates with far less computing power; scaling is limited primarily by GPU access rather than talent. DeepSeek pursues cost efficiency and self-use utility over immediate commercialization. He predicts NVIDIA's CUDA ecosystem will erode within a year, enabling domestic chip alternatives despite current capacity constraints.

title: 做了个能远程访问的本地 Markdown 知识库， Claude、ChatGPT 和手机 Web 都能读写
content: HomeKB is an open-source local Markdown knowledge base that allows remote access from Claude.ai, ChatGPT Web, and mobile browsers without requiring a public IP or open inbound ports. It uses an outbound tunnel from the local machine, with clients connecting via a one-time pairing code. The relay only stores pairing relationships and token hashes, not notes or search data. Recall@5 reaches 97% on real-world tests. The relay code can be self-hosted on Cloudflare Workers or Node.

title: 4小时、11个话题、118次回答，梁文锋内部交流回应一切
content:
DeepSeek completed its first external funding round, raising over 50 billion yuan ($7.4 billion) at a pre-money valuation of 367.5 billion yuan ($54.3 billion). Founder Liang Wenfeng contributed 20 billion yuan, with Tencent, CATL, and others participating.

At an investor meeting, Liang outlined DeepSeek's vision-driven, non-hierarchical culture without KPIs. The company prioritizes AGI over commercialization, focusing on coding agents and continuous learning as the next step toward self-improving AI. He acknowledged China's 12-18 month lag behind the US, attributing this primarily to compute constraints rather than talent gaps. DeepSeek maintains an open-source strategy, believing it increases success probability without harming revenue. The company aims for reasonable profits through API pricing and B2B services while avoiding competition with major tech firms.

title: AI幻觉最可怕的人类副作用出现了
content: A study by researchers from Paris, Rome, and Milan found that AI significantly undermines human metacognition. Across five experiments with 3,132 participants, access to AI caused admission of "I don't know" to drop from 44% to 3%, while confidence surged from 30% to 76%—despite accuracy falling from 27% to 9%. Even financial penalties for wrong answers failed to correct this behavior. Participants accepted AI-generated responses even when they knew the AI was unreliable. Crucially, passively displayed AI suggestions affected judgments similarly to actively sought ones. The researchers warn that AI's fluent outputs lower the cognitive threshold for deciding "I know enough," eroding critical self-awareness. Children face particular risk of never developing fundamental critical thinking skills if raised with ubiquitous AI.

title: 泡沫猎手：马斯克的三次完美逃顶
content: Elon Musk has exploited three major capital bubbles to build enduring businesses. In the 1999-2002 dot-com bubble, he sold Zip2 and PayPal—already cash-flow positive—to pocket $180 million, funding SpaceX and Tesla. During the 2008-2021 green energy bubble, Tesla raised $12 billion through three stock offerings at peak valuation, converting hype into factories, batteries, and charging networks while rivals collapsed. In the 2023-2026 AI bubble, Musk merged his AI startup xAI into SpaceX, then took the combined company public at a $1.77 trillion valuation, securing over $150 billion in combined cash reserves across his companies. His pattern: target infrastructure-level businesses with genuine competitive moats, exploit peak narrative moments for maximum funding, and rapidly convert paper gains into physical, irreplicable assets.

title: Codex 之后，你现在能在 Claude 「蒸馏」自己了
content: Claude's new "Record a skill" feature lets users demonstrate tasks by working normally while narrating their reasoning aloud, after which Claude converts the demonstration into a reusable Skill. This follows OpenAI's similar Codex feature "Record & Replay" launched in June. Rather than writing detailed SOPs manually, users can now teach AI through demonstration. The approach is most valuable for complex workflows with implicit rules that are hard to explain but easy to show. Effective recording requires explaining reasoning, not just actions, and proper testing with varied scenarios is essential to verify the Skill actually learned rules rather than memorizing steps.

title: 刚刚，全球三大AI包揽IMO满分，击败99%人类
content: Four AI systems achieved perfect 42/42 scores on the 2026 IMO math competition, outperforming 99.31% of human competitors. Claude Fable 5 (2.5 hours, $51), GPT-5.6 Sol (3.8 hours, $20), and Kimi K3 (17.4 hours, $31) each solved all six problems with distinct approaches. AxiomProver also scored perfectly. The test used formal Lean 4 problem statements translated by Axiom Math, founded by 25-year-old MIT graduate Letong Hong. This marks rapid progress from 2024's silver-level AI to 2026's满分 systems without specialized math training. Grok 4.5 failed due to agent-level hallucinations rather than mathematical limitations.

title: 越疆回应「A 股招股书存在重大股权瑕疵」：前员工宋某内部争议不影响股权清晰及控股权稳定性
content: Dobot refuted claims of major equity flaws in its A-share prospectus regarding former employee Song. Song joined in 2017, held indirect shares through an employee incentive plan transferred from founder Liu Peichao, and left in March 2021. His shares were subject to repurchase upon departure. A December 2022 equity transfer by Dobot's partnership was legal; Song did not cooperate with communications. Related legal action was dismissed due to arbitration jurisdiction. Dobot stated no pending litigation exists, disclosures are accurate, and this internal partnership dispute does not affect equity clarity, control stability, or operations. Song has repeatedly reported the company at critical listing moments.

title: 腾讯 AI 创意智能体 Miora 全量上线
content: Tencent has fully launched Miora, an AI-powered creative agent, for global users. The tool generates complex creative outputs including images, brand visual packages, videos, and 3D assets based on user requests. It also offers full-process editing features such as annotation, local modification, and frame selection editing.

title: 微软被曝正评估将 Kimi K3 接入 Copilot，推理成本年降 6 亿美元
content: Microsoft is internally testing Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model to evaluate migrating some Copilot inference requests from OpenAI and Anthropic, potentially reducing annual cloud infrastructure costs by up to $600 million. Kimi K3 shows competitive performance in code generation with lower inference costs, though complex reasoning requires further validation. Microsoft expects to complete initial technical verification within two months. Migration faces challenges including Copilot's architecture being tied to OpenAI, data sovereignty, and export controls. If adopted, Kimi K3 would likely be used for non-core, low-sensitivity tasks without altering Microsoft's exclusive cloud partnership with OpenAI.

title: 网传梁文锋四小时投资人会议内容，可靠吗？有哪些信息值得关注？
content: DeepSeek CEO Liang Wenfeng reportedly told investors that current product development is secondary to AGI progress, with coding agents and continuous learning as priorities. He dismissed 3D/video generation and world models as off-strategy, viewed multimodal capabilities as a component rather than core intelligence, and considered hallucinations a product issue worth solving but not critical. Liang stated DeepSeek's models are primarily built for internal use first, with cost efficiency prioritized over market share. He predicted eventual embodied intelligence as the endpoint, envisioning AI capable of self-improving its own development.

title: Copilot vs. raw API access: What are you actually paying for?
content: GitHub Copilot and raw API access serve different purposes. API access suits building custom systems with full control over prompts, security, and billing. Copilot provides development tooling that connects editors, repositories, issues, terminals, and organizational policies to streamline software development workflows. Copilot plans include code completions and allocate AI Credits for chat and agentic features, with pooled organization budgets. BYOK options allow using existing provider contracts. Choose API access for custom product features; choose Copilot for integrated development within existing GitHub workflows.

title: 百度：香港主要上市申请已获联交所确认
content: Baidu's application to convert its Hong Kong listing to a primary listing has been confirmed received by the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The conversion, expected to take effect within the year, would give Baidu dual primary listings in Hong Kong and New York. Market analysts suggest the fast-tracked process may allow inclusion in Stock Connect by September. Experts believe this would lead to better valuation of Baidu's AI business and support share price recovery, as current market pricing reportedly underestimates this segment.

title: 风险太大了
content: Chinese public funds' AI holdings hit a record 58.57% of assets in Q2 2026, surpassing previous peaks of 35%. Including upstream suppliers, true concentration reaches ~70%, totaling 3.5 trillion yuan in AI stocks. Other sectors—finance, real estate, healthcare, consumer, and cyclical—are at historic allocation lows. Further AI gains require new inflows, but potential sources (state funds, retail investors, foreign capital) appear unlikely. High valuations with limited buyers create significant crash risk if AI capital expenditure expectations falter. Other news: US-Iran tensions escalate; Xiaomi raised phone shipment targets; Dongshan Precision reported stolen optical modules; Tencent fell 7% on overseas bearish research.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 小豆小瓜_
